canonical_definition: A dataset of 31.5K aligned literary excerpts from 20 books in ten languages, including original English texts, official translations, and newly machine-translated texts in six low-resource languages, used to probe multilingual and cross-lingual memorization in LLMs.
papers: Causal Tree Extraction from Medical Case Reports: A Novel Task for Experts-like Text Comprehension

definitions.paper: Causal Tree Extraction from Medical Case Reports: A Novel Task for Experts-like Text Comprehension

characterization: A dataset of 31.5K aligned literary excerpts from 20 books in ten languages, including original English texts, official translations, and newly machine-translated texts in six low-resource languages, used to probe multilingual and cross-lingual memorization in LLMs.
